file_insights.insight: Connectivity probe integrated at optimal point: after metadata materialization but before expensive adapter spawn. This prevents resource waste on unreachable providers.
file_insights.pattern: Early failure detection in async workflow

file_insights.insight: State machine consistency maintained: failed connectivity check triggers fs::rename(running → pending) with corresponding event log record and thumbnail re-render. Preserves idempotency.
file_insights.pattern: Atomic state transitions with audit trail

patterns_discovered.pattern: Pre-flight async validation before expensive I/O
patterns_discovered.context: provider_reachable() await gates run_card() invocation, reducing unnecessary subprocess spawns
Failed connectivity check returns card to pending state for automatic retry, no explicit retry logic needed
Meta written to running_path immediately after state transition, consistency preserved via record() audit trail

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: provider_reachable() dependency not visible in diff
gotchas_discovered.impact: Function must be defined elsewhere; if missing, compile will fail. Implementation details (timeout, retry strategy) hidden.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Cross-reference implementation file; ensure timeout is reasonable for dispatcher critical path

gotchas_discovered.impact: provider_reachable() is awaited, so if it hangs, entire dispatcher stalls. No explicit timeout shown.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add timeout wrapper around provider_reachable() call (e.g., tokio::time::timeout)

gotchas_discovered.impact: Card immediately eligible for retry; rapid requeue spam possible if provider remains unreachable, causing high CPU
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider jittered backoff or cooldown period before allowing re-entry to running state

discoveries.approach_outcome: SUCCESS - Connectivity probe seamlessly integrated into pre-adapter-spawn gate. Two prior attempts also successful, indicating stable implementation. Resource waste from spawning adapters for unreachable providers is now prevented.

recommendations.action: Add counter metric for provider_reachable() failures, track by provider_name. Enable SLO monitoring on connectivity success rate.
Wrap provider_reachable() in tokio::time::timeout() with sensible default (e.g., 5s). Log timeout as separate error path.
Consider optional exponential backoff or cooldown period before requeue. Prevents rapid retry storms during provider outages.
Add integration test: mock unreachable provider, verify card transitions running → pending and event log records correctly.
Document connectivity check behavior in dispatcher comments and CONTRIBUTING guide. Clarify when connectivity failure triggers requeue vs. permanent failure.
